title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nftables bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nftables is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: nftables provides a packet-filtering tool, with numerous improvements in convenience, features, and performance. It is the designated successor to iptables, ip6tables, arptables and ebtables.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): nft manpage implies address is always required with dnat, but it's not (JIRA:RHEL-106743)  Attach creating nftables version info to tables' user data (JIRA:RHEL-108851)  Fix for memleak in trace_alloc_list() error path (JIRA:RHEL-111205)
affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian

fixes.description: Attach creating nftables version info to tables' user data
Fix for memleak in trace_alloc_list() error path

full_text:
An update for nftables is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

nftables provides a packet-filtering tool, with numerous improvements in convenience, features, and performance. It is the designated successor to iptables, ip6tables, arptables and ebtables.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): nft manpage implies address is always required with dnat, but it's not (JIRA:RHEL-106743)  Attach creating nftables version info to tables' user data (JIRA:RHEL-108851)  Fix for memleak in trace_alloc_list() error path (JIRA:RHEL-111205)
